 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/statements/return_1/sample_001/target.rs:6:5

help: wrap the field type in `ManuallyDrop<...>`

error[E0277]: `main` has invalid return type `i32`
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/statements/return_1/sample_001/target.rs:20:14

   |
